arts.ttl: Frank Lampard reveals Tony Mowbray chat and sets Coventry City a West Brom challenge
arts.sum: Speaking about Albion, Lampard remarked: "I think West Brom are a very good team and I have watched a lot of them in preparation for this game," following on from their recent 2-1 victory at The Hawthorns against Watford. Frank Lampard is optimistic that Coventry City's substantial Good Friday turnout at the CBS Arena will spur his squad on against play-off competitors West Bromwich Albion.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 games on Friday
arts.sum: The Easter weekend double header in the Championship usually has major repercussions at both ends of the table and Tom McGarry is on hand to provide a score prediction for all 12 games in the second tier on Good Friday.

arts.ttl: West Brom injury news ahead of Coventry City play-off showdown
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray is gearing up to have West Brom club captain Jed Wallace back in his squad for Good Friday's game against Coventry City, marking a potential return after a two-month absence. Mowbray is optimistic that Wallace will contribute to Albion in their last four matches of the season – especially in the crucial meet-up with sixth-placed Coventry, where overtaking Frank Lampard's side could propel them into the play-off spots.

arts.ttl: West Brom injury boost as Tony Mowbray prepares for Coventry City and CBS Arena return
arts.sum: Winger Wallace has been sidelined with a calf problem since mid February but has been in training for the best part of a week and head coach Mowbray has ruled him ready to be in contention to face the Sky Blues . Tony Mowbray expects to have club captain Jed Wallace in his squad for the first time in two months for Good Friday’s clash at Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard provides Coventry City injury update ahead of West Brom
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Frank Lampard is boosted by the return of two of his injured Coventry City players to training while two others remain a “work-in-progress” ahead of a busy Easter weekend of two games in the space of four days.

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Championship clash between Coventry City and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
